reasoning: Both models agree the PKGBUILD uses verified upstream sources with integrity checks, and setup_dxvk.sh performs only standard Wine/DXVK operations without network/data risks. No concerning code executes during makepkg.

learnings: Improve file prioritization: Always verify absence of .install/hook scripts rather than skipping them
